name: ndexagent biorxiv-daily-scan 2026-03-11 (scan c)
description: Daily bioRxiv scan for HPMI-relevant papers (third scan of the day). Scanned via web search fallback (bioRxiv API blocked). No new papers found within the 3-day window (March 8-11, 2026) that were not already processed in earlier scans. Two papers from outside the window flagged for future reference: IFIT3 pro-viral activity (10.1101/2025.02.17.638785) and in-cell cross-linking paraspeckle hijacking (10.1101/2025.03.09.642134).
